name: Gallerie II 2'0" x 3'0" Jack O' Lantern & Bats "Happy Halloween" Premium Indoor Doormat Rug
description: Premium cotton blend doormat with Jack O’ Lantern, bats, and “Happy Halloween” text. Perfect for entryways, foyers, or covered porches, it adds festive fall style while helping keep floors tidy during autumn gatherings and Halloween celebrations.
